violations.text: The outside dumpster was observed with sided doors open. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept closed. -PIC closed dumpster doors during time of inspection. -PIC Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
The faucet handle of the mop sink was observed in poor repair (piece missing). New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the racks in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024
The receptacles in the restrooms are lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

The outside dumpster is lacking a side door and therefore could not be covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

The following areas throughout the physical facilites were observed in poor repair: 1) The wall to the right of the rolling gate in the back storage room was damaged (heavy water stains, broken, pieces missing or crumbling) 2) Bottom coving area of wall in customer rest room (coving missing in areas) 3) Some ceiling tiles in retail area observed with water damage New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024

The wall behind the mop sink is constructed of sheet rock. This material is not non-absorbant or easily cleanable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
